case_title: TERRI CLAY ET AL VS. NBNI, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-15-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-26-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-30-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2020 CONTINUED TO MAY-19-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLAY, TERRI CLAY, STEPHANIE CLAY, BRIAN CLAY, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT NBNI, INC. SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA TIMING ASSOCIATION DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-15-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-23-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-30-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200010562)
